title: knautia communis subsp. sylvatica
intro: Knautia communis subsp. sylvatica, also known as Wood Knawel, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting digestion, due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Knautia communis subsp. sylvatica can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
